HealthInsights.title: Health
HealthInsights.subtitle: Insights
HealthInsights.description: AI-powered wellness analysis based on your recorded data.
HealthInsights.noInsightsDesc: Record your vitals and symptoms first, then click "Generate New Insight" to receive your AI-powered wellness analysis.
HealthInsights.consultationDesc: Based on your data, we recommend scheduling a consultation with your healthcare provider.
HealthInsights.disclaimer: This is a wellness analysis, not medical advice. Always consult your doctor for medical decisions.

Dashboard.title: Patient Overview
Dashboard.subtitle: Overview
Dashboard.welcome: Welcome back, {name}. Here is your health status today.
Dashboard.healthTrendsDesc: Daily fluctuations in heart rate and blood pressure.

HealthScore.optimalDesc: Your vitals are within optimal ranges. Keep it up!
HealthScore.monitorDesc: Minor fluctuations detected. Monitor and adjust habits.
HealthScore.actionRequiredDesc: Significant anomalies detected. Please consult your physician.

Segments.highAccessibilityDesc: Controls have been enlarged for better visibility. Navigation is simplified to focus on your core health metrics.
Segments.maternalHealthDesc: Specific tracking for fetal heart rate and urine test results is active. Please record daily for accurate monitoring.

Auth.loginDescription: Enter your credentials to access your vitals history.
Auth.signInSubtitle: Please sign in to your health dashboard.
Auth.signUpDescription: Join our platform to start monitoring your vitals.
Auth.name: Name

Intake.title: Medical Intake
Intake.description: Complete your clinical history and log current symptoms.
Intake.emergencyText: If you are experiencing severe chest pain, difficulty breathing, or sudden weakness, stop this intake and call emergency services.
Intake.privacyText: Your medical data is encrypted and complies with HIPAA and GDPR.
Intake.clinicalDesc: Historical data, family heredity, and habits.
Intake.familyPlaceholder: Any chronic diseases in your immediate family? (e.g. Diabetes, Hypertension)
Intake.habitsPlaceholder: Describe lifestyle habits (Smoker, Alcohol, Exercise, Diet)
Intake.symptomDesc: Detailed interrogation of current symptoms and pain.
Intake.detailPlaceholder: Describe how you feel, when it started, and any triggers.
Intake.intakeSuccessDesc: Your medical intake has been securely saved.
Intake.habitusDesc: Initial visual inspection of the patient.
Intake.clinicalNoteDesc: Record any anomalies such as pallor, cyanosis, jaundice, or motor difficulties.
Intake.alignmentDesc: Observe if the patient maintains an upright posture or if there are obvious tilts or asymmetries.
Intake.consciousnessDesc: Evaluate if the patient is alert, oriented in time and space, or appears confused or drowsy.
Intake.colorDesc: Look for signs of pallor, cyanosis (bluish tint), jaundice (yellow), or unusual redness.
Intake.breathingDesc: Observe if breathing is paced and effortless, or if there are signs of respiratory distress.
Intake.gaitDesc: Evaluate how the patient walks, looking for balance, fluidity, and coordination.
Intake.errorSave: Failed to save intake. Please try again.

Vitals.title: Vital Signs Tracking
Vitals.description: Record and monitor your physiological indicators in real-time.
Vitals.proTipText: Consistently tracking your vitals helps our AI provide more accurate trend predictions.
Vitals.instruction1: Ensure you are in a relaxed state.
Vitals.instruction3: Keep your arm at heart level for BP.
Vitals.instruction4: Input data carefully for AI accuracy.
Vitals.emergencyDesc: Hypertensive crisis detected. Contact your doctor or emergency services immediately.
Vitals.errorSave: Failed to save vitals. Please try again.
Vitals.estimationDesc: Answer these questions to estimate your oxygen levels.
Vitals.q3: Breathing more than 22 times per minute?

AIAdvice.title: Health Advisor
AIAdvice.disclaimerText: This reflects advice, not a prescription. The insights provided are based on automated trend analysis.
AIAdvice.consultDoctor: Always consult your doctor for medical decisions.

Profile.personalInfoDesc: We use this data to provide better AI health insights.

Onboarding.profileDescription: To activate the personalized health mode, we need some basic data.
Onboarding.success: Profile completed! The system has been optimized for you.

DoctorDashboard.title: Doctor Panel
DoctorDashboard.inviteDesc: Give this code to your patient so they can link their profile to your practice.
DoctorDashboard.overviewPatients: Overview of all patients assigned to your practice.
DoctorDashboard.clickInvite: Click "Invite Patient" to generate a code.

PatientDetail.noInsightsDesc: Patient must generate an insight from their Health Insights dashboard.
